svg.title: Long-distance face detection pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full pipeline from RTSP camera input through multi-scale tiled detection, NMS, face upscaling, encoding, recognition, and tracking to final output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What RTSP camera settings work best for long-distance face detection?')
sendPrompt('How does CLAHE help detect faces at long distances?')
sendPrompt('Why process the frame at 1x scale?')
sendPrompt('What does processing at 1.5x scale detect?')
sendPrompt('Why is 2x scale needed for long-distance detection?')
sendPrompt('How does tiled detection work for long-distance faces?')
g.text: InsightFace SCRFD runs on every tile

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is NMS and why is it needed after tiled detection?')
sendPrompt('Why allow faces as small as 20px for long-distance detection?')
g.text: Was 50–60 px; now catches far faces

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Lanczos upscaling improve face recognition accuracy at distance?')
sendPrompt('Which face_recognition model is used and why?')
sendPrompt('How does tracking persistence keep labels stable across frames?')
